_comment: Add one entry per Gmail/Workspace account. alias = the short name you'll use in tool calls ([A-Za-z0-9_-]+, unique); email = the exact address (unique). scope is 'modify' (read + label/archive + draft, never permanent delete) or 'readonly'. enable_send=false means no send tool is exposed; arming send ALSO requires GMAIL_MCP_ALLOW_SEND=1 in the server's environment (two-factor — a config edit alone can never enable sending). Copy this file to ~/.gmail-mcp-private/accounts.json and put your real values in.
